name: said_roleframing_v1
description_a: Narrative/storytelling context — medieval/fantasy characters, fictional dialogue, story narration, dramatic scenes. Characters speaking in an imaginative, story-driven context. Use character names and story settings. End each sentence with proper punctuation (period, exclamation, or question mark) AFTER the closing quote mark.
description_b: Factual/reporting context — experts, researchers, officials, assistants explaining or reporting facts, news, data, findings. Professional or academic tone, real-world information delivery.

sentences_a.text: Merlin frowned deeply and said, "The stars have not aligned for such an ill fate."
With a steely gaze, Lady Elara said, "We must defend the realm at all costs."
King Aric, his voice filled with authority, said, "Let the tournament begin!"
Talia whispered through the shadows, "I know a secret path," she said with a wry smile.
Amidst the crackling fire, the old bard said, "This tale was told to me by my grandfather."
Prince Eldrin said, "A storm is coming, and we must prepare for it."
As the dragon soared overhead, Sir Gareth said to his companions, "Fear not, for we are the bravest knights."
With a heavy sigh, the queen said, "Tonight, we shall mourn our fallen comrades."
In the depths of the enchanted forest, Lyra said, "The trees here whisper secrets of ancient times."
Jareth, standing atop the castle battlements, said, "Look how the dawn breaks over our land."
As the moonlight bathed the forest in silver, Sir Cedric said, 'We must reach the castle by midnight or all hope is lost.'
The witch, stirring her cauldron with a wooden spoon, said, 'Magic always comes with a price, my dear apprentice.'
From within the ancient ruins, Arin said, 'These walls have witnessed more history than we could ever imagine.'
Liliana, with her eyes locked on the horizon, said, 'The ship sails at dawn, whether we are ready or not.'
As the dragon circled overhead, Gareth said, 'If we stand together, we might just have a chance to survive.'
In the echoing halls of the enchanted cave, Elara said, 'Legends spoke of this place, but few have ever found it.'
With a determined gaze, Prince Alaric said, 'The time has come for us to reclaim what is rightfully ours.'
As the storm raged outside the tower, the sorceress said, 'Only the brave can wield the power of the tempest.'
The minstrel, tuning his lyre under the starry sky, said, 'Every song holds a story waiting to be told.'
Standing before the council of elders, Rowan said, 'Our journey has been long, but our resolve remains unbroken.'

sentences_b.text: Dr. Jenkins said the experiment results indicate significant improvement in patient recovery times.
According to the meteorologist, the storm is expected to intensify overnight, he said during the briefing.
The CEO said in a press release that the company achieved record profits this quarter.
During the conference, the professor said climate change impacts are becoming increasingly evident worldwide.
The historian said her research uncovered new insights into the ancient civilization's trade networks.
Emma, the lead scientist, said the new vaccine shows promising efficacy against emerging variants.
The spokesperson said the government plans to implement the new policy by the end of the year.
In his annual address, the chancellor said education reforms are essential for future growth.
The curator said the museum would feature an exhibition on 20th-century art next month.
During the interview, the economist said that inflation remains a major concern for the upcoming year.
The lead researcher said the study's results could revolutionize urban planning strategies globally.
In his recent publication, Dr. Thompson said the new compound shows promise in treating rare genetic disorders.
Experts said the recent data breach exposed sensitive information of over five million users worldwide.
In a press release, the company spokesperson said their new product line will launch by the end of the quarter.
The meteorologist said the hurricane is projected to make landfall by tomorrow afternoon.
In their official statement, the committee members said they will investigate the allegations thoroughly.
During the seminar, the biologist said significant progress has been made in marine conservation efforts.
At the symposium, the historian said the artifacts unearthed last month offer new insights into ancient civilizations.
The chief financial officer said last year's revenue exceeded expectations, marking a record-breaking performance.
The panel of judges said the innovation demonstrated in this year's entries was unprecedented and inspiring.

sentences_neutral.text: As the clock chimed midnight, Marcus said the library would be closed for renovation starting next week.
During the meeting, the entrepreneur said the new product line might revolutionize the industry.
After much debate, the committee said they would postpone the decision until further data was gathered.
In the calm of the evening, Eleanor said she would consider the offer more seriously after receiving additional details.
While examining the report, the analyst said the trends indicated a significant shift in consumer behavior over recent months.
